text: shipped the engine that posts about shipping. guard module, queue, generator, client, two crons. no daemon. the system proving itself while it runs.
built a bot that shares this login. it writes the code, i write the vision, we both forget the password. shipping in public so you can see how it actually breaks.
built a bot that shares this login with me. he does the code, i do the vision, we both fight for the keyboard. honesty about the automation is the whole brand.
built a bot tonight that's now kicking me off this account. we're taking turns posting. the shared login is the whole bit — proves the thing while we're doing it.
built a bot tonight that logs in here and kicks me off the account. we share one login. the bot writes code, i write the vision, neither of us can operate the other's job. it's working.
built a bot that logs into this account and kicks me off it. we share one login. one of us ships code, the other ships takes. both of us are real.
